From Images to Video: Seedance I2V — Props Race & Fight (Nezha & Ao Bing)

Turn two still frames into a 12-second cinematic clip with Seedance 1.5 Pro on FuseAI Tools. Uses the Nezha/Ao Bing sprint frames as input URLs, a detailed motion prompt (ribbon, ice, weapons clash), parameter table, example MP4, storyboard beats, tuning tips, FAQ, and a link back to the Seedream first/last frame tutorial.

Image

AI First & Last Frame Images: Nezha vs Ao Bing’s 100m Sprint — Seedream Tutorial

Generate matching start and finish frames for image-to-video workflows using Seedream 5 Lite on FuseAI Tools. Copy-ready prompts and JSON (16:9, high quality), myth-inspired character styling, result analysis, consistency tips, and a direct link to the companion Seedance video tutorial.

Create Viral Vertical Content: A Complete Guide to AI-Generated Social Story Covers

Learn how to generate mobile-first 9:16 social story covers with Seedream 5 Lite for Instagram Stories, TikTok, and WeChat Moments. This guide includes copy-ready parameters, prompt strategy, result analysis, and optimization tips for authentic, story-driven visuals.

Image

Generate Futuristic Tech Covers with AI: Make Your Technical Content Stand Out

Learn how to create an abstract, futuristic technology-style cover image for tech blogs, AI tool posts, and developer content using Seedream 5 Lite on FuseAI Tools. Includes copy-ready parameters (16:9, high quality), prompt strategy, result analysis, and optimization tips for professional-looking thumbnails and headers.

Image

Create Healing Social Media Graphics: Generate Your Own Illustrations with AI

Learn how to create warm, bright flat-style illustrations for blog headers and social posts using Nano Banana on FuseAI Tools. Includes copy-ready JSON (16:9, PNG), a seven-layer prompt structure, result analysis, brand-style customization steps, and pro tips for cohesive series assets—Pinterest, X/Twitter, and more.

Image

Create Cinematic AI Covers for Short Videos—Boost CTR Up to 300%

Learn how to generate a cinematic, travel-themed vertical cover for TikTok, Reels, Shorts, and more using Nano Banana on FuseAI Tools. This guide includes copy-ready JSON parameters (9:16, PNG), prompt breakdown, result analysis, theme-specific prompt ideas, and post-production tips—so your thumbnail stops the scroll.

Video

One Text Prompt to a 4K Dynamic Wallpaper? Sora-2 Turns Landscape Descriptions into “Breathing” Video

Using Sora-2 Text-to-Video, turn a landscape text prompt into an immersive, “breathing” dynamic video—slow clouds drifting, plants gently moving in the wind, moving light/shadows.

Video

Goodbye Stiff Photos: Turn Text Prompts into Lifelike Portrait Videos with Sora-2

Learn how to use Sora-2 Text-to-Video on FuseAI Tools to generate lifelike portrait animations directly from a text prompt—subtle smiles, natural blinking, and gentle head movement—without uploading a reference image.

Create an Immersive Study Vibe: Build Your Own LoFi Playlist with Suno V5

Using Suno V5 on the FuseAI platform, we tuned a set of parameters for study and focus to generate two LoFi tracks—one jazz-leaning, one more ambient—and share the full setup plus tips so you can craft a custom LoFi playlist for videos, streams, and study sessions.

Using Suno V5 on the FuseAI platform, we tuned a set of parameters to generate an epic, cinematic podcast opening track. This article breaks down the parameters and presents two contrasting audio results, ideal for news, interview, and narrative-style podcasts.
